ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "dyad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dyad (pair of individuals) involved in the interaction */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the interaction occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., Fist-Bump, High-Five, Shake-Hands) */,
  "prev_action" TEXT /* Previous action or interaction that preceded the current one */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the interaction occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the interaction took place */,
  "interaction_detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project to which the interaction data belongs */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag to indicate the quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_research_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_dyad_id FOREIGN KEY ("dyad_id") REFERENCES dyads ("dyad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dyads" (
  "dyad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dyad */,
  "name1" TEXT /* Name of the first individual in the dyad */,
  "name2" TEXT /* Name of the second individual in the dyad */,
  "dyad_name" TEXT /* Combined name of the dyad (e.g., Emily+Sean) */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the individuals */,
  "relationship_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the relationship */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the dyad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dyad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project to which the session data belongs */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_research_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
